$schema: Allowlist of known-intentional findings. Each entry: { file, line, rule, reason }. Match is exact on file path + rule + line. New migrations should prefer an inline '-- security-check: allow <reason>' comment over adding entries here.

allow.reason: Public contact form — anonymous INSERT only; reads are admin-gated via has_role().
Public newsletter signup — anonymous INSERT only; reads are admin-gated.
Public job application submission — anonymous INSERT only; reads are admin-gated.
Recreated job_applications table — same public INSERT policy as original migration.
Public job_alerts subscription — anonymous INSERT only.
Legacy job_alerts UPDATE policy; later tightened to (email = auth.email()) for authenticated users.
update_updated_at_column is a trigger function with no data access; cannot be invoked via PostgREST.
has_role() must be EXECUTE-able by anon/authenticated because RLS policies across the schema invoke it. Returns only a boolean.
cleanup_old_rate_limits() EXECUTE was revoked in a later migration (20260524065139) to service_role only.
Superseded — later migration (20251127084806) restricted contact_inquiries SELECT to admins via has_role().
Superseded — later migration (20251230110752) restricted job_alerts SELECT to (email = auth.email()).
service_testimonials are intentionally public — displayed on marketing pages to anonymous visitors.
case_studies are intentionally public — displayed on marketing pages to anonymous visitors.
